style: casual user tone with a small typo-free informal phrasing, 1-2 sentences

refined.instruction: Can you fill in the missing spot in this 3 by 3 logic grid? Keep the rule that every row and column should have 1, 2, and 3.
refined.editor_prompt: In the middle-center 3 by 3 grid, replace the muted question mark in the bottom-right grid cell with a centered green digit 1. Keep the light canvas background with thin border, the white square cells with black outlines, all existing centered digits, the grid layout, viewpoint, and flat 2D style unchanged.
refined.rational_target_description: The source is a flat 2D 3 by 3 grid with centered digits 1, 2, and 3, and a muted question mark in the bottom-right cell. Applying the rule that each row and column must contain 1, 2, and 3 determines that the missing bottom-right entry must be 1. The visual edit should replace only that question mark with a green 1 while preserving the canvas, border, grid outlines, existing digits, and overall layout.
refined.reasoning_chain: I see a 3 by 3 logic grid in the middle of the canvas, with the only unknown shown as a muted question mark in the bottom-right cell. The rule says each row and each column needs the digits 1, 2, and 3 exactly once. From the visible entries, the bottom-right missing value resolves to 1. I will edit only that bottom-right cell by changing the question mark into a centered green 1, leaving the rest of the grid and canvas untouched.

edit_operations.region_hint: middle center, in the bottom-right grid cell
edit_operations.change: replace it with a centered green digit 1
preserve: light canvas background with thin border
3 by 3 grid of white square cells with black outlines

cognitive: Does the completed 3 by 3 grid use 1, 2, and 3 so the missing bottom-right value is resolved as 1?
visual: Is the bottom-right grid cell showing a green digit 1 instead of the muted question mark?
Is the new 1 centered inside the bottom-right white square cell?
preservation: Are the existing digits, black cell outlines, white cells, and thin bordered light canvas unchanged?
Are there no added row labels, column labels, captions, pencil marks, or extra grid structures?
readability: Is the green 1 clearly legible at the same flat 2D text scale as the other centered digits?
